title: clerodendrum cyrtophyllum var. cyrtophyllum
intro: Clerodendrum cyrtophyllum var. cyrtophyllum, also known as the bushman's hat or the tropical glory bower, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Clerodendrum cyrtophyllum var. cyrtophyllum include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as aiding in wound healing and skin conditions. The plant's leaves and roots can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
